claims.summary: Pressure trend, texture, and provenance context should be additive and optional so legacy packets remain valid.
claims.disposition: verify protocol defaults, optional fields, captured fixtures, and compatibility projections

claims.summary: Missing pressure-trend context should mean unknown evidence, not implicit permission or a fabricated neutral state.
claims.disposition: verify optionality and unknown or insufficient-evidence paths

claims.summary: Evidence-only telemetry types must not bypass checked authority transitions into sensory dispatch.
claims.disposition: verify private-constructor authority wrappers and compile-fail dispatch boundaries
